message:
feat(freeze): Complete special_object opcode support (all 8 types)

Implements all 8 special_object types for the frozen interpreter:

Type 0 (arguments): JS_NewArguments() - proper arguments object
Type 1 (mapped_arguments): JS_NewMappedArgumentsSimple() - sloppy mode with callee
Type 2 (this_func): Static variable stores function during _init()
Type 3 (new_target): this_val with JS_CFUNC_constructor_or_func
Type 4 (home_object): JS_GetFrozenHomeObject() from global registry
Type 5 (var_object): JS_NewObjectProto(ctx, JS_NULL)
Type 6 (import_meta): JS_GetImportMetaCurrent() wrapper
Type 7 (null_proto): JS_NewObjectProto(ctx, JS_NULL)

Note: Type 1 (mapped_arguments) provides read-only access without the
live parameter aliasing that true mapped_arguments has. Functions that
modify arguments expecting aliasing should fall back to interpreter.
